title: pelargonium × crenulatum
intro: Pelargonium × crenulatum, also known as South African geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × crenulatum include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
